---
title: "VERBUM Corpus Analysis"
---

## About This Project

This interactive website presents analysis of the VERBUM corpus, examining age definitions and their relationship with gender and terminology.

### Key Features


- **Interactive Tables**: Search, sort, and filter the complete dataset
- **Visualizations**: Age distribution patterns across different terms
- **Cross-references**: Linked primary sources for each entry


### Navigation

Use the sidebar to explore:

- 📊 **Interactive Tables** - Full dataset with filtering
- 📈 **Plots** - Visual analysis of age definitions

### Data Summary

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)


verbum_df <- readxl::read_xlsx("VERBUM.xlsx")

verbum_clean <- verbum_df |> 
  rename_with(~ tolower(str_replace_all(.x, " +", "_"))) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(.x, "n/a"))) |> 
  separate(primary_references, into = c("author", "title", "para")) |> 
  group_by(author, title, para) |> 
  mutate(local_id = row_number(), .after = para)


# Brief summary statistics
verbum_clean |> 
  summarise(
    Total_Entries = n(),
    Unique_Terms = n_distinct(term),
    Genders = paste(unique(gender[!is.na(gender)]), collapse = ", "),
    Age_Groups = paste(unique(age_relative_definition[!is.na(age_relative_definition)]), 
                      collapse = ", ")
  ) |> 
  knitr::kable(caption = "Dataset Overview")

```
